title: Core Setup & Global Layout
summary: Initialize the Next.js app in the monorepo, configure Tailwind CSS, set up fonts, layout.tsx with Polish metadata, Navbar, and Footer.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js project is initialized at projects/tattoo-studio-landing-page
Tailwind CSS is configured
layout.tsx contains Polish SEO metadata
Navbar and Footer components are created and integrated into the layout

title: Data Models & Mock Data
summary: Create TypeScript interfaces and populate mockData.ts with placeholder content in Polish for all sections.
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript interfaces defined for Artist, PortfolioItem, Service, Testimonial, FAQ
mockData.ts exports arrays of placeholder data in Polish language

title: Static Sections
summary: Implement HeroSection, AboutSection, ServicesSection, and TestimonialsSection as React Server Components.
acceptanceCriteria: HeroSection includes background image placeholder, studio name, tagline, and CTA button
AboutSection contains static text about the studio
ServicesSection displays a list/grid of services with icons
TestimonialsSection displays review cards with ratings
All sections are fully responsive

title: Interactive Gallery (Portfolio)
summary: Build the PortfolioSection using next/image for optimization and implement client-side filtering.
acceptanceCriteria: PortfolioSection displays a masonry or responsive grid gallery of tattoo photos
Images use next/image for optimization (lazy loading, WebP)
Client-side filter allows filtering by style or artist
Images have appropriate alt text for accessibility

title: Artists & FAQ Sections
summary: Build the ArtistsSection and the interactive FAQSection.
acceptanceCriteria: ArtistsSection displays a grid of artist cards with names, styles, and social links
FAQSection is a Client Component with accordion-style toggles for questions
Both sections use data from mockData.ts

title: Contact Section & Form Actions
summary: Implement the ContactSection with a contact form, static details, embedded map, and a Server Action for form submission.
acceptanceCriteria: ContactSection displays address, map, hours, phone, and email
Contact form captures Name, Email, and Message with basic validation
Server Action simulates email dispatch and returns success/error state
Form includes ARIA labels for accessibility

title: Page Orchestration & Final Polish
summary: Assemble all sections in page.tsx, verify responsive design, and perform Lighthouse audits.
acceptanceCriteria: page.tsx imports and renders all section components in order
Application builds and runs locally without errors
Lighthouse scores for Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO are 90+
No TypeScript or linting errors exist
